'''ngobazhaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:gymnodomous|gymnodomous]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-b-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:gymnodomous|gymnodomous]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ngobazhaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngobazhithi|ngobazhithi]] || [[word:ngobazhiji|ngobazhiji]] || [[word:ngobazhishi|ngobazhishi]] || [[word:ngobazhiki|ngobazhiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngobazhuthuthu|ngobazhuthuthu]] || [[word:ngobazhujuju|ngobazhujuju]] || [[word:ngobazhushushu|ngobazhushushu]] || [[word:ngobazhukuku|ngobazhukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngobazhuthu|ngobazhuthu]] || [[word:ngobazhuju|ngobazhuju]] || [[word:ngobazhushu|ngobazhushu]] || [[word:ngobazhuku|ngobazhuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngobazhufthuf|ngobazhufthuf]] || [[word:ngobazhufjuf|ngobazhufjuf]] || [[word:ngobazhufshuf|ngobazhufshuf]] || [[word:ngobazhufkuf|ngobazhufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngobazhethe|ngobazhethe]] || [[word:ngobazheje|ngobazheje]] || [[word:ngobazheshe|ngobazheshe]] || [[word:ngobazheke|ngobazheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngobazhothotho|ngobazhothotho]] || [[word:ngobazhojojo|ngobazhojojo]] || [[word:ngobazhoshosho|ngobazhoshosho]] || [[word:ngobazhokoko|ngobazhokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngobazhotho|ngobazhotho]] || [[word:ngobazhojo|ngobazhojo]] || [[word:ngobazhosho|ngobazhosho]] || [[word:ngobazhoko|ngobazhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngobazhofthof|ngobazhofthof]] || [[word:ngobazhofjof|ngobazhofjof]] || [[word:ngobazhofshof|ngobazhofshof]] || [[word:ngobazhofkof|ngobazhofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngobazhĂŻfthĂŻf|ngobazhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngobazhĂŻfjĂŻf|ngobazhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngobazhĂŻfshĂŻf|ngobazhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngobazhĂŻfkĂŻf|ngobazhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngobazhĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|ngobazhĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngobazhĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|ngobazhĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngobazhĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|ngobazhĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngobazhĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|ngobazhĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngobazhĂŻfthĂŻf|ngobazhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngobazhĂŻfjĂŻf|ngobazhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngobazhĂŻfshĂŻf|ngobazhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngobazhĂŻfkĂŻf|ngobazhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngobazhĂŻfthĂŻf|ngobazhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngobazhĂŻfjĂŻf|ngobazhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngobazhĂŻfshĂŻf|ngobazhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngobazhĂŻfkĂŻf|ngobazhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngobazhĂŠthĂŠ|ngobazhĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:ngobazhĂŠjĂŠ|ngobazhĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:ngobazhĂŠshĂŠ|ngobazhĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:ngobazhĂŠkĂŠ|ngobazhĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngobazhathatha|ngobazhathatha]] || [[word:ngobazhajaja|ngobazhajaja]] || [[word:ngobazhashasha|ngobazhashasha]] || [[word:ngobazhakaka|ngobazhakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngobazhatha|ngobazhatha]] || [[word:ngobazhaja|ngobazhaja]] || [[word:ngobazhasha|ngobazhasha]] || [[word:ngobazhaka|ngobazhaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngobazhafthaf|ngobazhafthaf]] || [[word:ngobazhafjaf|ngobazhafjaf]] || [[word:ngobazhafshaf|ngobazhafshaf]] || [[word:ngobazhafkaf|ngobazhafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:ngobazhasha|ngobazhasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngobazhshĂ«asha|ngobazhshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngobazhroasha|ngobazhroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngobazhmuasha|ngobazhmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngobazhyaasha|ngobazhyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongobazhnkshĂ«asha|gongobazhnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongobazhnkroasha|gongobazhnkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongobazhnkmuasha|gongobazhnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongobazhnkyaasha|gongobazhnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:ngobabazhasha|ngobabazhasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngobabazhshĂ«asha|ngobabazhshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngobabazhroasha|ngobabazhroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngobabazhmuasha|ngobabazhmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngobabazhyaasha|ngobabazhyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongobabazhnkshĂ«asha|gongobabazhnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongobabazhnkroasha|gongobabazhnkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongobabazhnkmuasha|gongobabazhnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongobabazhnkyaasha|gongobabazhnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:ngebĂŠzhasha|ngebĂŠzhasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngebĂŠzhshĂ«asha|ngebĂŠzhshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngebĂŠzhroasha|ngebĂŠzhroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngebĂŠzhmuasha|ngebĂŠzhmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngebĂŠzhyaasha|ngebĂŠzhyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongebĂŠzhnkshĂ«asha|gongebĂŠzhnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongebĂŠzhnkroasha|gongebĂŠzhnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongebĂŠzhnkmuasha|gongebĂŠzhnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongebĂŠzhnkyaasha|gongebĂŠzhnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:ngobfazhasha|ngobfazhasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngobfazhshĂ«asha|ngobfazhshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngobfazhroasha|ngobfazhroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngobfazhmuasha|ngobfazhmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngobfazhyaasha|ngobfazhyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongobfazhnkshĂ«asha|gongobfazhnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongobfazhnkroasha|gongobfazhnkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongobfazhnkmuasha|gongobfazhnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongobfazhnkyaasha|gongobfazhnkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|b863984}}
